rule_metadata.name: HTMLVariant
rule_metadata.description: Identifier for html variant of FAKEM
rule_metadata.author: Katie Kleemola

rules.rule_text:
rule FakeM : Family
{
	meta:
		description = "FakeM"
		author = "Katie Kleemola"
		last_updated = "2014-07-03"

	condition:
		HTMLVariant
}

rule_metadata.name: FAKEMhtml
rule_metadata.description: Rule for just the HTML Variant
rule_metadata.author: Katie Kleemola

rules.rule_text:
rule FAKEMhtml : Variant
{
	meta:
		description = "Rule for just the HTML Variant"
		author = "Katie Kleemola"
		last_updated = "2014-07-10"

	condition:
		HTMLVariant
}
